notes: Extremely complex page. Dense DOM with thousands of elements, dynamic content loading, personalization, A/B testing, multiple overlapping navigation systems. Category mega-menu with nested flyouts. Cookie/privacy banner. Delivery location modal. Many endpoints are context-dependent (logged-in vs. guest).

endpoints.label: Search Bar
endpoints.description: Product search with category dropdown filter and autocomplete suggestions

endpoints.label: Sign In
endpoints.description: Account & Lists dropdown with sign-in button redirecting to auth flow

endpoints.label: Shopping Cart
endpoints.description: Cart icon with item count badge, links to cart/checkout page

endpoints.label: Top Navigation Bar
endpoints.description: Horizontal nav links: Today's Deals, Customer Service, Gift Cards, Sell, Categories, etc.

endpoints.label: Delivery Location
endpoints.description: Delivery location selector in header (Lieferung an / PLZ waehlen)
